chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.40 of 2022 Mrs. Samira Dada Versus Learned Banking Court No.IV & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 1139/22 Dated: 15.04.2024 Mr. Osman A. Hadi for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant, on instructions, does not press this appeal which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
